Author: ArcanineLS
Name: HrothgarMakeCoin
Description: Automatically undercuts your retainer market board listings, with optional AutoRetainer post-venture integration. A rebrand/fork of Dagobert by SHOEGAZEssb.
Changelog: Adds opt-in auto-list: post whitelisted items to a retainer's free market slots. Off by default, dry run on. Per-item price mode, mandatory minimum, quantity, and Spread to split a stack across several listings.
